relevant_links.title: MP SI 2026 — MPPEB Sub Inspector Notification, Salary ₹35,400, Eligibility & SyllabusMP Police SI 2026 by MPPEB/Vyapam: Salary ₹35,400–₹1,12,400. Graduation required. Apply at peb.mp.gov.in. Written exam (200 marks CBT) + Physical + Medical. MP domicile (Mool Niwas required).

RBI Careers 2026 — Grade B ₹55K, Assistant ₹36K, All Vacancies & Apply OnlineRBI recruitment 2026: Grade B Officer (salary ₹55,000–₹1,02,000), Grade A (DEPR/DSIM), Assistant (₹36,091), Office Attendant. Eligibility, exam dates, notification links & apply at opportunities.rbi.org.in. All posts in one place.

MAHATET 2026 (Maharashtra TET) — Notification, Teacher Salary ₹20,200+, Paper 1 & 2MAHATET 2026 by MAHA TET Board: Qualify → Maharashtra Govt Teacher salary ₹20,200+ (state scale). Paper 1 (Std 1–5) + Paper 2 (Std 6–8). Apply at mahatet.in. Marathi medium eligible.
